domains_completed.name: auth
findings_verified_clean: Auth.js v5 proper JWT session strategy (1h TTL)
bcryptjs cost 12 (NYDFS compliant)
Password history 12-password reuse prevention
Email verification enforced for OAuth
MFA TOTP with backup codes + audit log
Session invalidation on password change/reset
Encrypted OAuth tokens (AES-256-GCM)
HSTS 2-year preload
X-Frame-Options DENY
Double-submit CSRF with HMAC-SHA256 (httpOnly=false is by design for this pattern)
Rate limiting Redis-backed with in-memory fallback
IP extraction hardened (Azure, XFF rightmost, RFC validation)
Admin API guard with role + permission checks
SSRF protection via isPrivateOrReservedIP
user-api-guard rate limit uses correct @/lib/security.checkRateLimit (not broken)
MFA verify has 5/min rate limit per IP (sufficient for 6-digit TOTP)
false_positives_from_agent: CSRF httpOnly=false — intentional double-submit cookie pattern
user-api-guard rate limit broken — imports from @/lib/security with correct signature
MFA brute-force per-session — IP rate limit 5/min sufficient for TOTP

domains_completed.name: marketing
findings_verified_clean: Campaign send has atomic status guard (updateMany WHERE status IN sendable)
Campaign send has idempotency check (rejects SENT/SENDING status)
Unsubscribe uses signed JWT (jose.jwtVerify) with proper masking
Unsubscribe POST follows RFC 8058 (one-click via form-urlencoded)
Newsletter subscribe has IP rate limiting + CSRF + Zod validation + sanitization
Newsletter double opt-in (CASL/LCAP compliant)
Referral validate requires auth (F-007) + rate limit + CSRF
Referral apply has transaction with re-check (FLAW-042 race condition fix)
Referral self-referral prevention (by ID + by email)
Referral max usage limit (env-configurable)
Admin email send has withAdminGuard + CSRF + rate limit + Zod + audit log
Campaign recipients filtered by bounce suppression + consent + frequency cap
Email HTML content uses escapeHtml() for user data (XSS prevention)
All cron routes auth with CRON_SECRET + timingSafeEqual (re-verified)
false_positives_from_agent: CRIT-001: Cron auth weakness — already verified timingSafeEqual, agent suggested enhancements not vulns
HIGH-001: Unsubscribe JWT leaks email — email already in TO field, JWT is signed not public
HIGH-003: Referral code enumeration — auth required + 10/hr rate limit = 68yr to enumerate 10%
HIGH-004: Campaign send race condition — atomic guard already on L198-215 (updateMany)
HIGH-005: Bounce cache eviction DoS — admin-only business logic, not security
HIGH-006: Campaign send no idempotency — idempotency check already on L176-195

areas_verified_clean: All 33 cron routes auth with CRON_SECRET + timingSafeEqual
All admin export routes use withAdminGuard
Idempotency keys on all payment creation routes
Catalogue: explicit select prevents costPrice leak
Catalogue: InventoryTransaction logging already in place
Auth: proper JWT + bcrypt + password history + MFA
Marketing: newsletter CASL/LCAP double opt-in compliant
Marketing: unsubscribe RFC 8058 compliant with signed JWT
next_action: Continue with system domain. 7 domains remaining.
